overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The player moves from an open commercial sidewalk into a covered pedestrian walkway, then emerges into a bright sunlit intersection with heavy shadows and crosses the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts and vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past vending machines and neon signs

notable_agents.action: person walking away from camera along the sidewalk ahead

entered.detail: tall metal pole with traffic signals at the street corner
long row of orange and white striped barriers separating sidewalk from street
illuminated commercial signage on building facades with cyberpunk aesthetic
red and white automated vending machines lined against the building
round concrete seating structure with built-in planter

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open urban sidewalk in a futuristic commercial district. Orange construction barriers line the left side next to the street, while vending machines and neon signs illuminate the right. The pavement is wet and reflective, suggesting recent rain, with sparse pedestrians sharing the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under building overpass with construction areas

events.description: enters covered pedestrian walkway from open sidewalk, lighting becomes darker
approaching bright exit at end of covered walkway, intense sunlight visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor toward the bright light at the far end

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure with exposed beams and embedded lighting fixtures
large cylindrical columns supporting the overhead walkway structure
portable construction barricades with yellow and black diagonal stripes
piles of garbage bags and scattered litter accumulated against the building
temporary construction walls with blue and grey panels
tropical palm tree in large rectangular concrete planter

segments.scene_description: Moving through a covered pedestrian walkway beneath an overpass. The environment is darker with artificial lighting, featuring construction barriers, trash piles, and large support pillars. The camera progresses toward an intensely bright exit ahead where sunlight streams in, creating a high-contrast transition zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit urban intersection with crosswalks and traffic signals

events.description: exits covered walkway into bright sunlit intersection with heavy shadows
crossing the street at the crosswalk while traffic light is green

agents.ego_description: walking across the crosswalk in bright sunlight toward the intersection center

notable_agents.action: black futuristic car driving through the intersection
man in dark suit walking ahead crossing the street

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading California Ave mounted on pole
traffic signal showing green light for pedestrians
broad yellow and white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
tall building with geometric architecture and red structural accents
elevated enclosed walkway connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a dazzlingly bright urban intersection. The camera crosses the street at a marked crosswalk under a green traffic light, passing other pedestrians. A street sign for California Ave is visible, and futuristic buildings with an overhead pedestrian bridge frame the scene. Vehicles drive through the intersection as the camera moves toward the far side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a neon-lit commercial sidewalk through a dark underpass and into a dazzlingly bright urban intersection. It begins along a wet, reflective walkway lined with orange construction barriers and glowing vending machines, moving past sparse pedestrians under the hum of futuristic signs. As the camera progresses, the open air gives way to a covered pedestrian walkway beneath an overpass, where the environment shifts to a darker space filled with support pillars and trash piles. The scene then transitions through a high-contrast zone of streaming light as the camera emerges from the tunnel into the blinding glare of a sunlit street. Finally, the camera crosses a marked intersection at California Ave under a green light, passing vehicles and pedestrians beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge and towering futuristic buildings.
